content:
# Unconfined Compression Test

**Summary**: A test to determine the compressive strength of a rock sample.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-ameri|AL-AMERI, 2014]] used unconfined compression tests to evaluate the mechanical integrity of carbonate rocks.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-al-ameri|AL-AMERI, 2014]] UCS is fundamental for determining rock strength and stability.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-al-ameri|AL-AMERI, 2014]] measured using a 300 kN compression machine.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The UCS test was used to estimate the onset of failure and calculate rock modulus. ([[2014-al-ameri|AL-AMERI, 2014, p. 69]])
